subjects.name: Get Out! Events (GO Events)

typography_hierarchy.note: Manrope/Inter combo with bold KPI typography sets a confident agency tone.
typography_hierarchy.to_reach_10: Pair with a serif display weight in long-form case studies for editorial gravitas.

layout_information_architecture.note: Hero KPI badges (1,000+ events / 13yrs / 4.9★) create instant trust above the fold.
layout_information_architecture.to_reach_10: Add immediate-need vs pre-plan switcher and persistent quote-or-callback CTA.

visual_brand_distinctiveness.note: Orange/black palette and action photography differentiate clearly from peer agencies.
visual_brand_distinctiveness.to_reach_10: Commission a bespoke iconography system and signature motion language.

content_credibility_proof.note: Marquee logos (Google, DBS, Grab, Singtel) plus 200+ Google reviews carry deep proof.
content_credibility_proof.to_reach_10: Publish 3-tier published pricing and audited case-study outcomes (uplift / NPS).

mobile_performance_polish.note: Renders cleanly on mobile with reasonable LCP and 48px tap targets.
mobile_performance_polish.to_reach_10: Compress hero video, pin a sticky WhatsApp CTA, target sub-2s LCP across templates.

subjects.name: Elitez Events (self)

typography_hierarchy.note: Manrope display + Playfair serif accent + Inter body sets confident, layered hierarchy versus generic SG agency stack.
typography_hierarchy.to_reach_10: Lock a custom type-scale token across services and case-study templates with deliberate H1-H6 rhythm.

layout_information_architecture.note: Five-page structure (Home/Expertise/Work/About/Contact) is clear; Market Intel admin cluster adds a credible analyst layer.
layout_information_architecture.to_reach_10: Add a transparent self-serve pricing calculator and persona-based entry points for D&D / Family Day / FMCG activation.

visual_brand_distinctiveness.note: Burnt orange / cream / charcoal palette plus radial gradients reads distinctly Elitez vs orange-on-white peer agencies.
visual_brand_distinctiveness.to_reach_10: Commission bespoke production photography and a signature motion language for hero transitions.

content_credibility_proof.note: Group ecosystem (security agency + temp staffing + payroll) is a real differentiator; needs more named-client case studies.
content_credibility_proof.to_reach_10: Publish 3-5 case studies with named brands, PAX, ROI uplift, and audited NPS, plus ISO 20121 roadmap.

mobile_performance_polish.note: Mobile-responsive layouts render cleanly; hero gradient and Chart.js admin pages still need budget tuning.
mobile_performance_polish.to_reach_10: Compress hero assets, pin sticky 'Plan an event' CTA on mobile, target sub-2s LCP across all templates.

subjects.verdict: Brand and typography already match the SG agency category lead; credibility artefacts (case studies + ISO) and mobile speed are the missing tenths.

synthesis.elitez_position: Tied with Get Out! and Cohesion as category-leading SG event brands on visual brand and typography; ahead of every regional/global incumbent on warmth and editorial layering, behind only on named-client case-study proof and mobile speed.
easy_wins_for_elitez: Surface the 'group ecosystem' (security + temp staffing + payroll under one P&L) above the fold on every page — it is the single biggest unfair advantage and currently buried.
Publish 3-5 named case studies with PAX / ROI uplift / NPS for marquee SG corporates already in the work portfolio.
Ship a self-serve pricing calculator (PAX × tier × add-ons → 24h budget band) — would make Elitez the first SG event agency with transparent sub-grant pricing.
ten_x_aspirations: ISO 20121 + EcoVadis Gold sustainability stack with audited per-event carbon report — only event agency in SG offering this.
AI-enabled production playbook: generative previz, voice-of-host AI captioning, real-time sentiment dashboard for live events.
Public 'Elitez Events Index' — quarterly published market study with our own benchmark data, replacing CCCS / ICCA as the SG corporate-events authority.
